title.es: Resumen diario de herramientas de codificación IA — 4 jun 2026
title.en: Daily AI Coding Tools Brief — 4 Jun 2026
title.fr: Résumé quotidien des outils de codage IA — 4 juin 2026

description.es: Semana de gran expansión: Claude Code v2.1.161 con Opus 4.8 y ultracode, GitHub Copilot estrena facturación por AI Credits y app con Canvases, OpenAI llega a Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic lanza Claude Security y archiva confidencialmente su S-1 para IPO, y Alibaba publica Qwen3.7-Plus como agente multimodal GA.
description.en: An expansive week: Claude Code v2.1.161 with Opus 4.8 and ultracode dynamic workflows, GitHub Copilot launches usage-based AI Credits billing and its desktop app with Canvases, OpenAI arrives on Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic ships Claude Security and confidentially files its IPO S-1, and Alibaba releases Qwen3.7-Plus as a GA multimodal agent.
description.fr: Une semaine d'expansion: Claude Code v2.1.161 avec Opus 4.8 et ultracode, GitHub Copilot lance la facturation par AI Credits et son app avec les Canvases, OpenAI arrive sur Amazon Bedrock, Anthropic lance Claude Security et soumet confidentiellement son S-1 d'IPO, et Alibaba publie Qwen3.7-Plus comme agent multimodal GA.

text.es: Claude Code v2.1.154–161: Opus 4.8 por defecto, plugins sin marketplace y workflows ultracode para cientos de agentes
text.en: Claude Code v2.1.154–161: Opus 4.8 default, marketplace-free plugins, and ultracode workflows for hundreds of agents
text.fr: Claude Code v2.1.154–161: Opus 4.8 par défaut, plugins sans marketplace et workflows ultracode pour des centaines d'agents

text.es: GitHub Copilot: facturación por AI Credits activa y app con Canvases — superficies bidireccionales agente-humano
text.en: GitHub Copilot: AI Credits billing live and app Canvases — bidirectional agent-human work surfaces
text.fr: GitHub Copilot: facturation AI Credits active et app Canvases — surfaces de travail bidirectionnelles

text.es: OpenAI llega a Amazon Bedrock: modelos GPT accesibles vía Responses API compatible en AWS
text.en: OpenAI on Amazon Bedrock: GPT models accessible via compatible Responses API in AWS
text.fr: OpenAI sur Amazon Bedrock: modèles GPT accessibles via l'API Responses compatible dans AWS

text.es: Qwen3.7-Plus GA: agente multimodal con GUI grounding, ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, a la mitad del precio de Opus 4.7
text.en: Qwen3.7-Plus GA: multimodal GUI agent, ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, half the price of Opus 4.7
text.fr: Qwen3.7-Plus GA: agent multimodal GUI, ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, moitié du prix d'Opus 4.7

text.es: Anthropic archiva S-1 para IPO y lanza Claude Security para escanear vulnerabilidades en código
text.en: Anthropic files IPO S-1 and launches Claude Security for codebase vulnerability scanning
text.fr: Anthropic dépose son S-1 d'IPO et lance Claude Security pour l'analyse des vulnérabilités

title.es: v2.1.154: Opus 4.8 por defecto y trigger ultracode para workflows dinámicos
title.en: v2.1.154: Opus 4.8 default and ultracode trigger for dynamic workflows
title.fr: v2.1.154: Opus 4.8 par défaut et déclencheur ultracode pour les workflows dynamiques

body_html.es: Opus 4.8 es ahora el modelo por defecto con máximo esfuerzo. El keyword ultracode (antes llamado workflow) lanza workflows dinámicos que orquestan decenas a cientos de agentes en paralelo para tareas de gran escala. Fast mode corre a 2.5× la velocidad y es 3× más barato que antes.
body_html.en: Opus 4.8 is now the default model at high effort. The ultracode keyword (renamed from workflow) launches dynamic workflows that orchestrate tens to hundreds of background agents for large-scale tasks. Fast mode runs at 2.5× speed and is 3× cheaper than previous versions.
body_html.fr: Opus 4.8 est le modèle par défaut à effort élevé. Le mot-clé ultracode (renommé depuis workflow) lance des workflows dynamiques orchestrant des dizaines à centaines d'agents en arrière-plan. Fast mode tourne à 2.5× la vitesse, 3× moins cher.

title.es: v2.1.157: Plugins auto-cargados desde .claude/skills sin marketplace
title.en: v2.1.157: Plugins auto-loaded from .claude/skills without a marketplace
title.fr: v2.1.157: Plugins chargés automatiquement depuis .claude/skills sans marketplace

body_html.es: Los plugins en directorios .claude/skills se cargan automáticamente sin marketplace. El nuevo comando claude plugin init <nombre> genera el andamiaje de un plugin en un solo paso.
body_html.en: Plugins placed in .claude/skills directories are now auto-loaded without requiring a marketplace. The new claude plugin init <name> command scaffolds a new plugin in a single step.
body_html.fr: Les plugins dans .claude/skills sont chargés automatiquement sans marketplace. La nouvelle commande claude plugin init <nom> génère l'échafaudage d'un plugin en une seule étape.

title.es: v2.1.158: Auto mode disponible en Bedrock, Vertex y Foundry para Opus 4.7/4.8
title.en: v2.1.158: Auto mode now available on Bedrock, Vertex, and Foundry for Opus 4.7/4.8
title.fr: v2.1.158: Mode Auto disponible sur Bedrock, Vertex et Foundry pour Opus 4.7/4.8

body_html.en: Auto mode is now available on Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, and Azure Foundry for both Opus 4.7 and Opus 4.8. Enterprise teams using managed cloud providers can now leverage automatic model selection without switching to self-hosted setups.

title.es: v2.1.160: Confirmación antes de escribir en archivos de inicio de shell o configs de build
title.en: v2.1.160: Prompt before writing to shell startup files or build-tool configs
title.fr: v2.1.160: Confirmation avant d'écrire dans les fichiers de démarrage shell ou configs de build

body_html.en: Claude Code now prompts before writing to shell startup files (e.g. .bashrc, .zshrc) and build-tool configuration files that grant code execution. Prevents silent, hard-to-detect environment modifications. Also fixed Windows/WSL clipboard issues and vim mode bugs.

title.es: v2.1.161: Métricas OTEL con atributos de recurso y herramientas paralelas más robustas
title.en: v2.1.161: OTEL metrics with resource attributes and more robust parallel tool execution
title.fr: v2.1.161: Métriques OTEL avec attributs de ressource et exécution parallèle plus robuste

body_html.en: OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES values are now included as labels on metric datapoints. A failed Bash command no longer cancels other in-flight parallel tool calls. Includes fixes for login flow, telemetry edge cases, and Windows compatibility.

title.es: Archivado de sesiones y enlaces clicables con OSC 8 en el TUI
title.en: Session archiving and OSC 8 clickable links in TUI
title.fr: Archivage des sessions et liens OSC 8 cliquables dans le TUI

body_html.en: Sessions can now be archived from the TUI via /archive or from the CLI with codex archive / codex unarchive — archived sessions are protected from resume or fork until restored. TUI markdown now keeps web links clickable with OSC 8 metadata.

title.es: Codex Sites: crea y despliega webs, dashboards y apps directamente en el producto
title.en: Codex Sites: create and deploy websites, dashboards, and apps in-product
title.fr: Codex Sites: créez et déployez des sites web, dashboards et apps directement

body_html.en: Sites is now in preview in the Codex app — create, save, deploy, and inspect websites, dashboards, internal tools, web apps, and games hosted by OpenAI. Works alongside the chat workflow for full-stack prototyping without leaving the tool.

title.es: Computer Use en Windows y soporte de Amazon Bedrock como proveedor
title.en: Computer Use on Windows and Amazon Bedrock as model provider
title.fr: Computer Use sur Windows et Amazon Bedrock comme fournisseur de modèle

body_html.en: Computer Use now operates on Windows desktop apps — Codex can see, click, and type in foreground windows. Additionally, Codex supports Amazon Bedrock as a model provider, using AWS-managed authentication, account controls, and consolidated billing.

title.es: Modelos OpenAI ahora disponibles en Amazon Bedrock vía Responses API
title.en: OpenAI models now available on Amazon Bedrock via Responses API
title.fr: Modèles OpenAI désormais disponibles sur Amazon Bedrock via l'API Responses

body_html.en: OpenAI models are now accessible in Amazon Bedrock through an OpenAI-compatible Responses API endpoint. Availability varies by AWS region. Enterprises can run OpenAI models with AWS-managed auth, VPC controls, and consolidated billing — without leaving their existing cloud infrastructure.

title.es: Facturación de sesiones Container cambia a por minuto (mínimo 5 min)
title.en: Container session billing switches to per-minute model with 5-minute minimum
title.fr: Facturation des sessions Container passe au modèle à la minute (minimum 5 min)

body_html.en: Container session billing replaced the flat 20-minute rate with per-minute billing and a 5-minute minimum. The per-minute cost is unchanged — shorter sessions will be significantly cheaper under the new model.

title.es: Depreciaciones API: objetos prompt reutilizables, plataforma Evals y Agent Builder
title.en: API deprecations: reusable prompt objects, Evals platform, and Agent Builder
title.fr: Dépréciations API: objets prompt réutilisables, plateforme Evals et Agent Builder

body_html.en: Deprecation notices issued for reusable prompt objects, the Evals platform, and Agent Builder. Additionally, GPT-4.5 retires from ChatGPT on June 27, 2026 — API users should migrate to GPT-5.x models before that date.

title.es: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist 1.53.2: correcciones de bugs y mejoras menores
title.en: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist 1.53.2: bug fixes and minor product enhancements
title.fr: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist 1.53.2: corrections de bugs et améliorations mineures

body_html.en: IntelliJ Gemini Code Assist 1.53.2 released June 3, 2026 with bug fixes and minor enhancements. This is the last scheduled maintenance release before the June 18 individual-tier end-of-service date.

title.es: ⚠️ 18 jun: fin de servicio para usuarios individuales — migración a Antigravity
title.en: ⚠️ Jun 18: end of service for individual users — migrate to Antigravity
title.fr: ⚠️ 18 juin: fin de service pour les utilisateurs individuels — migration vers Antigravity

body_html.en: Gemini Code Assist IDE Extensions and Gemini CLI stop serving requests for individual, Google AI Pro, and Google AI Ultra tiers on June 18, 2026. Google is consolidating all tools into its multi-agent Antigravity platform. Standard and Enterprise tiers continue without interruption.

title.es: Gemini 3.5 Pro: GA esperada en junio con ventana de 2M tokens y Deep Think
title.en: Gemini 3.5 Pro: GA expected in June with 2M-token context and Deep Think reasoning
title.fr: Gemini 3.5 Pro: GA attendue en juin avec contexte 2M tokens et raisonnement Deep Think

body_html.en: Gemini 3.5 Pro is in limited Vertex preview after Sundar Pichai promised it “next month” at Google I/O 2026. Targets a 2M-token context window, Deep Think reasoning, and frontier multimodal — the use cases Gemini Ultra used to cover. No confirmed GA date yet.

title.es: Facturación por AI Credits activa: controles de presupuesto por usuario y nuevo tier Max
title.en: AI Credits billing live: per-user budget controls and new Copilot Max tier
title.fr: Facturation AI Credits active: contrôles de budget par utilisateur et nouveau tier Max

body_html.en: As of June 1, every Copilot interaction — completions, chat, and code review — consumes GitHub AI Credits. Code review also consumes GitHub Actions minutes. User-level budget controls are now GA for organizations and enterprises. The new Copilot Max tier with higher quotas is available for existing subscribers via plan upgrade.

title.es: App de Copilot en preview para todos: Canvases, voz, sesiones cloud y navegación agéntica
title.en: Copilot app preview expanded to all plans: Canvases, voice, cloud sessions, agentic browsing
title.fr: App Copilot en preview pour tous: Canvases, voix, sessions cloud et navigation agentique

body_html.en: The Copilot app technical preview is now available to all Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise customers on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Headline feature: Canvases — bidirectional surfaces where the agent updates and you edit, reorder, approve, or redirect on the same surface. Also ships on-device voice (STT), cloud sessions for remote agent work, cloud automations for scheduled tasks, and agentic browsing to verify changes in an integrated browser.

title.es: Lanzamiento de Claude Security: escaneo de código y sugerencias de parches de vulnerabilidades
title.en: Claude Security launch: codebase scanning and vulnerability patch suggestions
title.fr: Lancement de Claude Security: analyse de code et suggestions de correctifs de vulnérabilités

body_html.en: Anthropic released Claude Security, a new product that uses frontier models to scan codebases and suggest patches for vulnerabilities. Launched alongside the Project Glasswing expansion — extending Anthropic's Mythos model to 150 more organizations in 15+ countries for automated software vulnerability detection.

title.es: Anthropic presenta confidencialmente S-1 ante la SEC para su IPO
title.en: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC for IPO
title.fr: Anthropic soumet confidentiellement son projet S-1 à la SEC pour son IPO

body_html.en: Anthropic filed a draft S-1 registration statement with the SEC on June 1, 2026 — the formal first step toward going public. The filing follows the Claude Opus 4.8 launch and a reported $65B funding valuation. No IPO date has been announced. Anthropic joins OpenAI and xAI in signaling a 2026 liquidity event.

notes.es: Agente multimodal GA. GUI grounding con ScreenSpot Pro 79.0. Workflows agénticos GUI+CLI híbridos. Precio: $2.50/$7.50 por 1M tokens.
notes.en: GA multimodal GUI agent. ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, hybrid GUI+CLI agentic workflows. Pricing: $2.50/$7.50 per 1M tokens — half the cost of Opus 4.7.
notes.fr: Agent GUI multimodal GA. ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, workflows agentiques GUI+CLI hybrides. Prix: $2.50/$7.50 / 1M tokens.

notes.es: Modelo GA más capaz. Contexto 1M tokens, 61.4 Intelligence Index (#1 global). Fast mode a 2.5× velocidad, 3× más barato que versiones anteriores.
notes.en: Most capable GA model. 1M-token context, 61.4 Intelligence Index (ranked #1 globally). Fast mode at 2.5× speed, 3× cheaper than previous models.
notes.fr: Modèle GA le plus capable. Contexte 1M tokens, 61.4 Intelligence Index (#1 mondial). Fast mode à 2.5× la vitesse, 3× moins cher.

notes.es: GA en Google I/O 2026. Inteligencia frontier a 4× la velocidad. 76.2% Terminal-Bench 2.1. $1.50/$9 por 1M tokens, contexto 1M.
notes.en: GA at Google I/O 2026. Frontier intelligence at 4× the speed. 76.2% Terminal-Bench 2.1. $1.50/$9 per 1M tokens, 1M context.
notes.fr: GA à Google I/O 2026. Intelligence frontier à 4× la vitesse. 76.2% Terminal-Bench 2.1. $1.50/$9 / 1M tokens.

notes.es: Flagship solo texto. Intelligence Index 56.6 (#1 en China). 1M tokens. 60.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Menor tasa de alucinaciones de la frontera: 22.9%.
notes.en: Text-only flagship. Intelligence Index 56.6 (#1 Chinese model). 1M tokens. 60.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Lowest hallucination rate in frontier: 22.9%.
notes.fr: Flagship texte uniquement. Intelligence Index 56.6 (#1 modèle chinois). 1M tokens. 60.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Taux d'hallucination le plus bas: 22.9%.

notes.es: 1T params (32B activos), open-weight. 58.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Swarm de agentes: 300 sub-agentes y 4.000 pasos coordinados.
notes.en: 1T params (32B active), open-weight. 58.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Agent swarm scaling to 300 sub-agents and 4,000 coordinated steps.
notes.fr: 1T params (32B actifs), open-weight. 58.6% SWE-Bench Pro. Essaim d'agents: 300 sous-agents et 4 000 étapes coordonnées.

notes.es: MoE 1.6T parámetros, entrenado en 32T tokens, contexto 1M nativo. Lanzamiento más significativo desde R1. Variante V4-Flash para alto rendimiento.
notes.en: 1.6T-parameter MoE, trained on 32T tokens, native 1M-token context. Most significant release since R1. V4-Flash variant for high-throughput workloads.
notes.fr: MoE 1.6T paramètres, entraîné sur 32T tokens, contexte 1M natif. Sortie la plus significative depuis R1. Variante V4-Flash haute performance.

notes.es: Prometido para junio 2026 en Google I/O. Objetivo: contexto 2M tokens, razonamiento Deep Think, multimodal frontier. Preview limitado en Vertex. Sin fecha GA confirmada.
notes.en: Promised for June 2026 at Google I/O. Targets 2M-token context, Deep Think reasoning, frontier multimodal. Currently in limited Vertex preview. No confirmed GA date.
notes.fr: Promis pour juin 2026 à Google I/O. Cible: contexte 2M tokens, raisonnement Deep Think, multimodal frontier. Preview limité Vertex. Pas de date GA confirmée.

notable_trends.es: La semana estuvo dominada por la expansión a la distribución en la nube: OpenAI en Amazon Bedrock vía Responses API, Auto mode de Claude Code en Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry, y Codex con soporte nativo de Bedrock como proveedor. La gobernanza se desplaza hacia los controles del proveedor de nube, y los equipos empresariales pueden ahora centralizar autenticación y facturación.
notable_trends.en: The week was dominated by cloud distribution expansion: OpenAI on Amazon Bedrock via Responses API, Claude Code Auto mode on Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry, and Codex with native Bedrock provider support. Governance is shifting toward cloud-provider controls, allowing enterprise teams to centralize authentication and billing under existing AWS/Azure/GCP agreements.
notable_trends.fr: La semaine a été dominée par l'expansion de la distribution cloud: OpenAI sur Amazon Bedrock, mode Auto de Claude Code sur Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry, et Codex avec support natif Bedrock. La gouvernance se déplace vers les contrôles des fournisseurs cloud, permettant aux équipes entreprise de centraliser auth et facturation.

notable_trends.es: La facturación agéntica granular se está convirtiendo en el nuevo estándar del sector: GitHub Copilot completó su transición a AI Credits por interacción con controles de presupuesto por usuario, mientras OpenAI simplificó los contenedores a un modelo por minuto. El modelo de suscripción fija está siendo reemplazado por economía de consumo a medida que los agentes multiplican el volumen de llamadas.
notable_trends.en: Granular agentic billing is becoming the new industry standard: GitHub Copilot completed its move to per-interaction AI Credits with per-user budget controls, while OpenAI simplified container billing to per-minute. The flat subscription model is giving way to consumption economics as agents multiply the volume of interactions.
notable_trends.fr: La facturation agentique granulaire devient le nouveau standard: GitHub Copilot a finalisé sa transition vers des AI Credits par interaction avec contrôles de budget par utilisateur, pendant qu'OpenAI simplifie la facturation conteneur au modèle à la minute. L'abonnement fixe cède la place à l'économie de consommation.

notable_trends.es: Las interfaces bidireccionales agente-humano emergen como paradigma dominante: Canvases de Copilot, workflows ultracode de Claude Code y Qwen3.7-Plus con GUI grounding apuntan todos hacia el mismo patrón — agente y humano trabajando sobre la misma superficie de trabajo, con el humano dirigiendo y el agente ejecutando de forma visible y revisable.
notable_trends.en: Bidirectional agent-human interfaces are emerging as the dominant paradigm: Copilot Canvases, Claude Code ultracode workflows, and Qwen3.7-Plus GUI grounding all converge on the same pattern — agent and human on the same work surface, with the human steering and the agent executing visibly and reviewably.
notable_trends.fr: Les interfaces bidirectionnelles agent-humain s'imposent comme paradigme dominant: Canvases de Copilot, workflows ultracode de Claude Code et GUI grounding de Qwen3.7-Plus convergent tous vers le même patron — agent et humain sur la même surface de travail, l'humain dirigeant et l'agent exécutant de façon visible.
